# CVPixelBufferFillExtendedPixels(_:)

**Function**

Fills the extended pixels of the pixel buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
func CVPixelBufferFillExtendedPixels(_ pixelBuffer: CVPixelBuffer) -> CVReturn
```

## Parameters

- **pixelBuffer**: The pixel buffer whose extended pixels you want to fill.

## Return Value

A Core Video result code. See [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/core-video-constants] for possible values.

## Discussion

This function replicates edge pixels to fill the entire extended region of the image.

## Modifying Pixel Buffers

- **CVPixelBufferLockBaseAddress(_:_:)**: Locks the base address of the pixel buffer.
- **CVPixelBufferUnlockBaseAddress(_:_:)**: Unlocks the base address of the pixel buffer.
